title: Extra Command Block
description: Transform the look and feel of command blocks in Minecraft with this custom texture pack. Modify their textures and animations for a whole new visual experience!
body:
## Intro : Transform the **appearance of your command blocks** in Minecraft with this **texture pack**. This pack **replaces the default textures** of regular, chain, and repeating command blocks with **unique and visually appealing designs**. Additionally, the pack supports **Connected Textures Mod (CTM)**, ensuring that command blocks placed next to each other seamlessly connect for a smooth, unified look. Whether you're working on **redstone contraptions**, **command block systems**, or just want a more polished aesthetic for your builds, this texture pack is the perfect addition to enhance your gameplay experience. ### Features: - Replaces the textures of **Normal, Chain, and Repeating Command Blocks**. - **CTM (Connected Textures Mod)** support for smooth transitions between adjacent blocks. - Adds a fresh, **stylish look** to your redstone and command block projects. - Enhances the overall **aesthetic** of your Minecraft world. **Perfect for**: Redstone engineers, map makers, or anyone looking to improve the visual appeal of command blocks in their world! --- Download now and give your command blocks a stunning new look! ## Discover More Amazing Mods! Enjoy this mod? Don’t miss future updates! Click the Follow button on the project page to get notified when new content is released. 💚🚀 ## Partners : This project is proudly supported by BisectHosting. Check out their services to easily host your projects with quality and reliability.

## Call to Action : Have questions? Need help? Join us on Discord to get involved with the community and contribute!
